mnemonics: ARRAY I/O = 'A Real Roundabout Yields Input/Output' - 'Real' for read, 'Roundabout' for reshape, 'Yields' for np.loadtxt/np.savetxt
keyPoints: Use np.loadtxt() and np.savetxt() for simple text-based array I/O
Use np.save() and np.load() for efficient binary storage of NumPy arrays
Always specify delimiter and dtype parameters when reading/writing CSV files
Handle array reshaping appropriately when reading from or writing to files
commonMistakes: Forgetting to specify delimiter when reading CSV files, causing read errors
Mixing up array dimensions when reshaping after file input
Using inappropriate data types (dtype) when reading numerical data from text files
Attempting to read binary files with text-based methods like loadtxt
